zh.Kreuznach, Rheinland, Prussia: 海因里希_海普洛文次可茲納賀
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon I. von Sponheim於1207年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀巴德 可茲納賀時，他的父親Gottfried III. von Sponheim31歲，母親Adelheid von Sayn23歲。他於1240年與Margarete von Hengebach在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon I. von Sponheim于1207年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀巴德 可茲納賀时，他的父亲Gottfried III. von Sponheim31岁，母亲Adelheid von Sayn23岁。他于1240年与Margarete von Hengebach在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon I. von Sponheim was born in 1207, in Bad Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Gottfried III. von Sponheim, was 31 and his mother, Adelheid von Sayn, was 23. He married Margarete von Hengebach in 1240, in Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters.

Il a épousé Margarete von Hengebach en 1240, à Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon I. von Sponheim(이)가 1207년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 바드 크레우즈나치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottfried III. von Sponheim(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Sayn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1240년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 슐로ss브oc켈하임에서 Margarete von Hengebach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Margarete von Hengebach в 1240 г. в местности щлоssбoккелхим, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери.
